assertions.text: Output identifies recurring themes with sentiment tags and frequency notes
At least one representative direct quote per theme
Output ends with 3-5 specific recommended actions

themes-identified.note: 4-5 themes identified: rates content (positive), geographic bias (negative), ghostwriting gap, length concern

representative-quotes.note: Direct quotes included for each theme

actionable-takeaways.note: 5 actions: add UK rates, cover ghostwriting, shorten links section, expand content-writer coverage, maintain contract features

themes-identified.note: 3-4 themes: episode length, ads, topic requests, platform issues
